releaseNotes:
Version 0.7.0 Major Release!
- Added new backup streaming servers (VidZee and VidSrc Top) for increased reliability
- Overhauled Watchlist page performance with hardware-accelerated grids and smoother menu transitions
- Optimized LoginPage layout and tap targets for a perfect fit on mobile screens (including 360x750 viewports)
- Added real-time loading feedback spinner when starting specific episodes
- Offline library features moved to staging for optimization
- Overall speed, stability, and navigation enhancements
